expected_wr_per_subregime.hot: 68-95% (lifetime hot 68.3%; live 94.6% with Phase-5 selection bias)
expected_wr_per_subregime.cold: 49-55% unfiltered; +8pp lift via wk4 × swing_high=low cascade

lifetime_validation.agreement_with_L1: PERFECT — detector reproduces L1's hot/cold split exactly

live_classification.verdict: Live April 2026 is uniformly HOT Bear sub-regime — matches expectation. F1 broad-band finding holds in this sub-regime; cold cascade reserved for future regime shift.

comparison_with_choppy.architectural_implication: Per-regime sub-regime detectors with different axes. Vol percentile is universal primary; secondary axis is regime-specific. Bull regime likely needs another secondary axis (e.g., 60d return positive direction or sector momentum).
